parameters.query:
with new_qualified as (
  select count(*)::int as cnt
    from public.referrals r
   where r.qualified_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
),
balances as (
  select coalesce(sum(bonus_rub),0)::int as total_balance
    from public.loyalty_balances
),
top_referrers as (
  select c.full_name, count(r.*) filter (where r.status='qualified')::int as qualified,
         count(r.*)::int as total
    from public.contacts c
    join public.referrals r on r.referrer_contact_id = c.id
   where r.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days'
   group by c.id, c.full_name
   order by qualified desc nulls last, total desc
   limit 5
),
repeat_orders as (
  select count(*)::int as cnt
    from public.leads
   where repeat_of is not null
     and created_at >= now() - interval '7 days'
)
select (select cnt from new_qualified) as qualified_this_week,
       (select cnt from repeat_orders) as repeat_orders_this_week,
       (select total_balance from balances) as total_loyalty_rub,
       (select string_agg(format('• %s — %s/%s', full_name, qualified, total), E'\n') from top_referrers) as top_text;

string.name: report
string.value: 📊 Премиум — отчёт за неделю Квалифицированных рефералов: {{$json.qualified_this_week}} Повторных заказов: {{$json.repeat_orders_this_week}} Общий бонусный баланс клиентов: {{$json.total_loyalty_rub}} ₽ Топ рефереров (за 30 дней): {{$json.top_text || 'пока нет данных'}}
